findingsNew.title: README still labels the Spec Kit section as Documentation instead of Framework
findingsNew.claim: README.md still uses the old Spec Kit Documentation label in both the TOC and heading, despite the active phase requiring Spec Kit Framework.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked the README top feature table, which already says Spec Kit Framework at README.md:5, so the old label is localized drift rather than a global naming convention.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: The old label could be intentionally narrower, but the active phase spec explicitly names the replacement.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: If the phase spec is amended to make the rename optional or preserve the old anchor intentionally, downgrade to P2.

findingsNew.title: Goal plugin is only documented as a Utility command instead of a full FEATURES subsection
findingsNew.claim: README.md does not give the mk-goal plugin equivalent FEATURES-section treatment, even though this phase requires a full Goal Plugin FEATURES subsection.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked the plugin README for an existing detailed mk-goal contract and root README FEATURES headings for comparable core-system treatment.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: Goal could be intentionally command-only in a general README, but the active phase scope explicitly says it should be promoted.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: If the phase spec is amended to keep Goal as command-only documentation, downgrade to P2.

findingDetails.title: README still labels the Spec Kit section as Documentation instead of Framework
findingDetails.scopeProof: README.md:33 and README.md:208 contain the old label; spec.md:78 and spec.md:113 require the rename and old-anchor cleanup.

findingDetails.title: Goal plugin is only documented as a Utility command instead of a full FEATURES subsection
findingDetails.scopeProof: README.md:366/557/678/778 show comparable full feature sections; README.md:1230-1233 gives Goal only a Utility entry; plugin contract exists at .opencode/plugins/README.md:49; spec.md:78 and spec.md:135 require promotion.

agents_crosscheck.notes: No stale implementation-detail claims found for flat convergence defaults, fixed timeout ceilings, SCAFFOLD_NEVER_TOUCHED omission, stall watchdog, or cost cap.
